---
title: "remove_self_intersections"
generated: true
description: "Reduce self-intersections by Laplacian-relaxing the offending vertices."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.intersection`](../nitrix-geometry-intersection.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:remove_self_intersections -->
```python
remove_self_intersections(mesh: Mesh, *, n_iterations: int = 10, lam: float = 0.5) -> Mesh
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:remove_self_intersections -->
Reduce self-intersections by Laplacian-relaxing the offending vertices.

Each iteration detects intersecting face pairs and applies one Laplacian
smoothing pass *restricted to the vertices of those faces*, until the mesh
is intersection-free or `n_iterations` is reached.  The topology
(`faces`) is preserved.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:remove_self_intersections -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `mesh` | `Mesh` | — | — | Triangle mesh to clean up. |
| `n_iterations` | `int` | — | `10` | Maximum number of relaxation passes. |
| `lam` | `float` | — | `0.5` | Laplacian smoothing step applied to the offending vertices. |

**Returns** `Mesh`. A `Mesh` with the same `faces` and relaxed `vertices`. Host-side (the detection loop is host-side); not differentiable.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
